sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, I can see the black shape has moved down and is now overlapping with the yellow shape. The yellow shape appears to be partially consumed (only the top bar and part of the vertical stem are visible). The charcoal shape has also moved down. Let me check the segmentation.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current segmentation
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5 and n['color'] not in ('b', 'S'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  WHITE: id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] < 40:
        print(f"  YELLOW: id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
